title: Internal Error: ../V3Param.cpp:1798: Could not find array index in unlinked text: '' for node: CELLARRAYREF

features.name: interface array of sub-interfaces with scoped access
features.description: Code should include an interface containing an array of sub-interfaces with a parameterized array size, where an element of that sub-interface array is accessed via scoped reference inside an interface function

features.name: interface function with case statement accessing array element
features.description: Code should include an interface function with a case statement that returns a scoped reference to an array element of a sub-interface array

features.name: parameterized interface array size expression
features.description: Code should include an interface array declared with a parameterized size expression ( subtraction) as part of the array bounds
